comments.body: The 1.15 branch didn't get the htpasswd fixes. I backported the commit.
Also needs a cherry pick of b4449c693ccfb0c7d8d7bf782fe8594dbb1a6d09

> Also needs a cherry pick of [b4449c6](https://github.com/containers/buildah/commit/b4449c693ccfb0c7d8d7bf782fe8594dbb1a6d09)

Thanks, done!
Aaaah ... the jobs are fine but `docker://registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora-minimal:latest` isn't reachable :sob:

@edsantiago, we moved the `fedora-minimal` over to quay for the podman CI. Shall we do the same here?

This rests my counter from 1 to 0 days of external sources not breaking CI :-D

As best I can recall, this is one of the few cases where we actually want to rely on multiple external registries, because that's what the test actually tests. It wouldn't hurt to add a retry to this test, though. I'll file an issue to remind me.

Thanks, Ed!

I restarted the tests. `fedora-minimal` is back online.

LGTM
now to get bors happy

> now to get bors happy

:smiling_imp: booooooorrrrs

This is why I love bors
Build failed:

    cirrus-ci/success

> This is why I love bors
> Build failed:
> 
> ```
> cirrus-ci/success
> ```

That made me merge manually, so the planet burns a bit slower.
